results.title: The Missing Layer in Darden Restaurants’ Intelligence | Ken Herron
highlights:
The Missing Layer in Darden Restaurants’ Intelligence | Ken Herron

Agree & Join LinkedIn

By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement, Privacy Policy, and Cookie Policy.

# Ken Herron’s Post

5d

Most restaurant AI conversations still focus on automation. I think the more important question is memory. Because every day, companies like Darden Restaurants generate millions of operational conversations: guest recovery moments manager coaching allergy handling staff coordination service escalations reservation friction loyalty signals Most disappear the moment the interaction ends. Not because they lack value. Because the surrounding systems were never designed to preserve conversational continuity as enterprise infrastructure. That becomes strategically important once AI systems start participating in operations. AI can summarize interactions. Route workflows. Identify patterns. Support coaching. Surface operational risk. But without durable conversational continuity underneath, organizations repeatedly lose context they already paid to create. That’s why I believe the emerging IETF vCon standard deserves more attention. Not simply as another AI tool. As a potential infrastructure layer for portable, governable, AI-ready conversations. Darden already understands operational scale better than almost anyone in hospitality. The next competitive layer may not just be operational efficiency. It may be how quickly organizations learn from the conversations already happening across the enterprise.#AIInfrastructure#ConversationalAI#HospitalityTechnology#EnterpriseAI#vCon#CustomerExperience#RestaurantTechnology#OperationalIntelligence

The Missing Layer in Darden Restaurants’ Intelligence Ken Herron on LinkedIn

One thing I keep coming back to: Most enterprises already have the signals. What they often lack is continuity between the signals. Hospitality may become one of the clearest examples of why conversational infrastructure matters operationally, not just technically. Especially once AI systems begin influencing service, coaching, escalation handling, and operational decision-making at scale.

Reply 9 Reactions 10 Reactions

To view or add a comment, sign in

results.title: SENIOR DATA SCIENTIST (REMOTE OPPORTUNITY) | Wfh
highlights:
# SENIOR DATA SCIENTIST (REMOTE OPPORTUNITY)
[...]
Hyatt Hotels Corporation seeks an enthusiastic Senior Data Scientist to join our Data Science/Decision Science team. In this role, you will translate business objectives into advanced AI, Machine Learning and Operations Research models, help build data-driven decision-making solutions across key areas of the business, directly contributing to Hyatt’s mission of delivering distinctive experience for our guests.
[...]
You will have the opportunity to tackle complex business challenges by applying cutting-edge machine learning and operations research techniques, with a focus on building optimization models and decision-support assets. As part of a growing, collaborative, and highly visible Data Science team, you will work alongside talented professionals in data analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI, all passionate about transforming the future of hospitality through the power of data science.
[...]
- The Role
- Translate business problems in a variety of business areas into well-defined data science projects, ensuring alignment with business goals, scope, and defined KPIs.
[...]
- Design, implement, and optimize advanced machine learning and optimization models to address complex business challenges.
[...]
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including engineering, data, and business stakeholders, ensuring clear communication, seamless integration of data-driven solutions.
[...]
- Monitor model performance in production, refining algorithms and processes to adapt to real-world data and evolving business needs.
[...]
- Create and maintain detailed documentation for models, methodologies, and workflows to support team knowledge-sharing.
[...]
- Conduct testing and validation of models to ensure robustness, scalability, and reliability in production environments.
[...]
- Present data-driven insights, findings, and product outcomes to stakeholders in a clear, actionable manner.
[...]
- Stay updated on the latest advancements in machine learning and optimization, integrating innovative techniques and tools into projects.
[...]
- Experience Required:
[...]
- Master’s degree in computer science, statistics, industrial engineering, or related fields required, PhD preferred.
- 5+ years of experience in data science, operations research, or related area (2+ years for candidates with PhD).
- Expertise in operations research modeling (LP, IP, MIP) and tools (CPLEX, Gurobi, etc).
[...]
- Expertise in building machine learning models, including supervised, unsupervised, and deep learning methods.
[...]
- Expertise in feature engineering, model evaluation, and hyperparameter tuning.
[...]
- Expertise in Python, SQL, and Spark, and a broad array of machine learning frameworks (Scikit-Learn, XGBoost, Tensorflow, PyTorch, MXNet, LLM, etc).
[...]
- Experience in developing and deploying solutions in a Cloud environment (AWS, Azure, GCP) with large datasets.
[...]
- Experience with streaming data architectures.

results.title: lululemon Staff AI/ML Applied Scientist job with lululemon | 311355
highlights:
lululemon Staff AI/ML Applied Scientist job with lululemon | 311355
[...]
# lululemon Staff AI/ML Applied Scientist
[...]
Description & RequirementsWho we are lululemon is an innovative performance apparel company for yoga, running, training, and other athletic pursuits. Setting the bar in technical fabrics and functional design, we create transformational products and experiences that support people in moving, growing, connecting, and being well. We owe our success to our innovative product, emphasis on stores, commitment to our people, and the incredible connections we make in every community we're in. As a company, we focus on creating positive change to build a healthier, thriving future. That includes creating an equitable, inclusive and growth-focused environment for our people. About this team The Enterprise Data & AI team is a strategic and operational driver of growth for lululemon, owning and building the data and AI platforms and products that enable the enterprise to operate with intelligence at scale. The team leads the design and delivery of a trusted unified data foundation, advanced analytics capabilities, and AI solutions across lululemon's vertically integrated retail ecosystem, embedding strong data governance and responsible AI practices from the very beginning. By applying AI to critical business challenges and creating new, transformative AI solutions, the team helps reshape how lululemon operates. Through deep partnership with product, technology, and business teams, Enterprise Data & AI accelerates product innovation, unlocks measurable value, elevates guest and educator experiences, and drives enterprise efficiency. Core responsibilities As a Staff Applied AI/ML Scientist, you define, lead, and scale AI/ML solutions aligned to business outcomes. You provide technical leadership and direction, design the solution for problems with high system complexity and multiple components. Your solutions model enterprise standards and lifecycle practices and ensure solutions are scalable, reliable, and ethically applied. You lead complex initiatives across teams, influence technology decisions, and embed solution ‑ oriented thinking and across AI/ML investments. You operate as a technical authority for applied AI/ML methodology and state-of-the-art, setting scientific direction for complex problem domains. Example of work include:
[...]
- Designing and deploying machine learning and predictive/generative AI models for demand forecasting, optimization, personalization and search, intelligent automation, and multimodal content creation and enrichment
[...]
- Applying NLP, computer vision, multimodal, or time ‑ series modeling techniques to enterprise-scale data sets that are a mix of structured and unstructured data
[...]
- Establishing frameworks for productionizing AI solutions and how AI/ML model performance translates into business decisions.
[...]
domains apply AI/ML to business problems, and develop production-ready AI/ML models and solutions that deliver business value
[...]
designing AI/ML
[...]
- 9-12 years of AI/ML research in industrial/corporate setting, or equivale research experience, including educational experience (e.g., a PhD degree)
[...]
- Demonstrated experience in technically leading applied AI/ML solution delivery for high ‑ impact business problems where solution architecture, model choice, evaluation rigor, quality, and trade ‑ off decisions materially affect outcomes
[...]
- Experience designing complex AI/ML solutions with multiple models and components and deploying them to production
[...]
- Experience establishing domain-wide frameworks for AI/ML solution design and implementation including development standards, evaluation criteria, and responsible AI requirements adopted across teams.
[...]
- Experience with ML implementation using commonly used tools such as Python, pyTorch , cloud ML platforms and libraries, open-source toolkits, and creating reusable ML components

results.title: lululemon Applied AI/ML Scientist job with lululemon | 313183
highlights:
lululemon Applied AI/ML Scientist job with lululemon | 313183
[...]
# lululemon Applied AI/ML Scientist
[...]
Description & Requirements Who we are lululemon is an innovative performance apparel company for yoga, running, training, and other athletic pursuits. Setting the bar in technical fabrics and functional design, we create transformational products and experiences that support people in moving, growing, connecting, and being well. We owe our success to our innovative product, emphasis on stores, commitment to our people, and the incredible connections we make in every community we're in. As a company, we focus on creating positive change to build a healthier, thriving future. That includes creating an equitable, inclusive and growth-focused environment for our people. About this team The Enterprise Data & AI team is a strategic and operational driver of growth for lululemon, owning and building the data and AI platforms and products that enable the enterprise to operate with intelligence at scale. The team leads the design and delivery of a trusted unified data foundation, advanced analytics capabilities, and AI solutions across lululemon's vertically integrated retail ecosystem, embedding strong data governance and responsible AI practices from the very beginning. By applying AI to critical business challenges and creating new, transformative AI solutions, the team helps reshape how lululemon operates. Through deep partnership with product, technology, and business teams, Enterprise Data & AI accelerates product innovation, unlocks measurable value, elevates guest and educator experiences, and drives enterprise efficiency. Core responsibilities As an Applied AI/ML Scientist, you design, develop, test, and optimize AI/ML solutions that address defined business problems, with an emphasis on applied modeling, experimentation, and translating advanced AI research into scalable, production-ready solutions. You work independently to design and adapt AI/ML approaches to build prototypes, and improve model performance, reliability, and efficiency. You use domain knowledge and collaborate with stakeholders and product teams to map the business problem to the right model and AI/ML solution approach. You own the AI solution implementation and partner with engineering teams to integrate solutions into the broader engineering system. You contribute to solution enhancements, validate outcomes, and continuously improve models based on real world performance. Examples of projects could be
[...]
- Designing and deploying machine learning and predictive/generative AI models for demand forecasting, optimization, personalization and search, intelligent automation, and multimodal content creation and enrichment
[...]
- Applying NLP, computer vision, multimodal, or time series modeling techniques to enterprise-scale datasets that are a mix of structured and unstructured data
[...]
- Developing experimentation frameworks and evaluation approaches to measure business impact of AI solutions in production
[...]
- Collaborating with product and engineering teams to embed AI models into end to end business workflows
[...]
- Bachelor's degree in computer science, machine learning, mathematics, or related field, Masters preferred
[...]
- 4-8 years of experience building and optimizing AI/ML solutions, or equivalent research experience, including educational experience (e.g., Master's or PhD degree)
[...]
- Demonstrated experience in evaluating and applying state-of-the-art AI/ML models and methods to develop practical, high-performing solutions to specific use-cases.
[...]
- Experience designing AI/ML approaches, conducting experiments to evaluate performance, iterating on solution design to improve performance, and translating AI-ML driven insights into business goals
[...]
- Experience with ML implementation using commonly used tools such as Python, pyTorch, cloud ML platforms and libraries, open-source toolkits.

# Principal Data Scientist – Machine Learning & AI Solutions for World-Class Guest Experiences
[...]
At arenaflex, we believe that the power of data and artificial intelligence can transform ordinary moments into extraordinary memories. Our commitment to innovation mirrors the passion of our founder, who envisioned a world where imagination knows no limits. Today, that vision lives on in every attraction, every experience, and every technological advancement we create.
[...]
### Principal Data Scientist
[...]
to join our Dynamic Experiences and Items team. In this pivotal role, you will help shape the future of guest experiences by developing, deploying, and supporting cutting-edge data analysis and machine learning models for our world-renowned attractions. This is a unique opportunity to apply your technical expertise at the intersection of innovation and entertainment, working alongside brilliant minds who share your passion for pushing technological boundaries.
[...]
### Lead Machine Learning Initiatives:
[...]
Drive the development and execution of machine learning strategies that address complex business challenges. You'll identify opportunities where ML can solve creative problems and deliver measurable value to our operations and guest experiences.
[...]

[...]
Lead and work alongside other data scientists and engineers to implement scalable machine learning solutions. Your work will power the intelligent systems that create seamless, personalized experiences for our guests.
[...]
Spearhead research and development efforts, including proofs of concept, technology pilots, and innovation initiatives that push the boundaries of what's possible in AI and data science.
[...]
Build standard methodologies for daily operations and work with specialized units to design, plan, and execute large-scale projects in the AI and machine learning space.
[...]

Deploy and optimize machine learning algorithms across predictive analytics, clustering, image recognition, natural language processing (NLP), anomaly detection, and more. Evaluate their performance on real-world datasets to ensure continuous improvement.

2+ years of demonstrated expertise in Python programming with experience in predictive modeling using frameworks such as TensorFlow, SparkMLib, PySpark, LightGBM, MXNet, or similar technologies.

results.title: SENIOR DIRECTOR OF TECHNOLOGY- MDM & DATA PLATFORMS (REMOTE) | Jobflarely
highlights: We are CDAI—the data and artificial intelligence engine of Compass Group North America. We design and deliver custom, in-house solutions tailored to the unique complexities of food service and hospitality. Our work is grounded in strong data foundations, layered with AI to enhance forecasting, streamline operations, and enable better, faster decision-making across Compass Group. With deep integration into the business and a commitment to white-glove service, CDAI empowers associates, clients, and customers through innovative, future-forward technologies. About the Role We are seeking a Sr. Director of Technology to lead the technical direction and delivery of our Master Data Management (MDM) platform. This role focuses on defining architectural vision and guardrails, establishing engineering discipline and leading the adoption of AI-enabled development practices. You will partner closely with Product Leadership and embedded technology leaders to ensure strong alignment between business priorities and technical execution. We are looking for a leader who can operate at both strategic and operational levels—someone who can define the future, elevate people, and drive meaningful change across teams. Key Responsibilities Platform & Architecture Define and own the architecture vision for MDM, PIM, and integration services Establish architectural guardrails, patterns, and standards across all product teams Drive decisions on data models, integration patterns, and platform design Ensure alignment with enterprise architecture, security, and scalability requirements Engineering Standards & Delivery Define & enforce SDLC standards for testing, code quality, and releases Partner with DevOps on CI/CD, reliability, and environment practices Implement consistent release governance and production readiness practices AI Enablement & Engineering Transformation Lead the adoption of AI-assisted development practices across the engineering organization Define standards and guardrails for safe, scalable, and effective use of AI in SDLC, developer workflows and tooling Champion a culture of experimentation and innovation while maintaining enterprise grade controls People Leadership Build and lead a high-performing technical organization (Architecture, DevOps, Engineering) Establish and uphold a high technical hiring bar, improving hiring accuracy and speed Foster a collaborative, accountable, and continuously learning team culture Cross-Team Collaboration Enable Product Pods to operate effectively within defined standards and guardrails Lead cross-pod alignment on shared services, integration frameworks, and reusable components Act as the final decision authority for cross-team technical decision and architectural trade-offs Operational Readiness Support production systems with a focus on reliability and observability Partner on incident management and continuous improvement Qualifications Required 8–10+ years in software engineering or technical leadership roles Experience with platform-based or data-intensive systems Strong cloud-native experience (AWS preferred) Hands-on experience with: Python services (FastAPI, Flask, or similar) Modern results.title: Christopher Chang — Senior VP & Chief Information Officer at Darden Restaurants | Comparably
highlights:
Christopher Chang — Senior VP & Chief Information Officer at Darden Restaurants | Comparably
[...]
# Christopher Chang — Senior VP & Chief Information Officer at Darden Restaurants
[...]
Mr. Christopher Chang, also known as Chris, has been Chief Information Officer and Senior Vice President at Darden Restaurants, Inc. since April 2016. Mr. Chang oversees all information services, technology and digital marketing functions for Darden. Mr. Chang is a beneficial owner at InfoNow Corp. Previously, he served as Senior Vice President, Technology Strategy, Innovation and Planning where he was responsible for leading Darden's overall technology strategic plan and for working closely with key business and IT leaders to build and leverage business capabilities to drive value creation. He is employee at InfoNow Corporation. He joined Darden from Caesars Entertainment in Las Vegas where he served as Corporate Vice President, Innovation and Information Technology Strategy. There, he founded and led the innovation team that was focused on developing, piloting and implementing new technologies and business solutions across 50 casino properties worldwide. Prior to Caesars, he served as Vice President, Strategy and Product Management for Denver-based INFONOW Corporation, where he led the company's overall strategy and business-process design efforts. He owns and operates more than 1,500 Olive Garden, LongHorn Steakhouse, Bahama Breeze, Seasons 52, The Capital Grille, Eddie V's and Yard House restaurants in North America, employing 150,000 people and serving more than 334 million meals annually. He holds both bachelor's and master's degrees in Electrical Engineering from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.
[...]
## Senior VP & Chief Information Officer Impact on IT Department's Culture
[...]
Christopher Chang holds the highest position within the IT department at Darden Restaurants — Senior VP & Chief Information Officer, and therefore has influence on the culture of the IT department.

highlights:
Senior Data Scientist – Omni-Channel Retail Analytics & Business Intelligence Leadership Role | Hirevector
[...]
# Senior Data Scientist – Omni-Channel Retail Analytics & Business Intelligence Leadership Role
[...]
Join arenaflex as a Senior Data Scientist – Transform Data into Strategic Impact
[...]
Are you ready to leverage your analytical expertise and lead a team of data professionals in one of the most dynamic industries in the world? arenaflex is seeking a talented
[...]
### Senior Data Scientist
[...]
to join our Product Frameworks and Examination group within the Consumer Products, Gaming, and Publishing (CPGP) division. This is your opportunity to work at the intersection of data science, retail analytics, and cutting-edge technology while shaping the future of how we understand and serve our global audience.
[...]
At arenaflex, we believe that data is the backbone of every great decision. As a Senior Data Scientist, you will be instrumental in translating complex datasets into actionable business insights that drive strategy across both our physical retail locations and e-commerce platforms. Your work will directly influence how we connect with millions of customers worldwide, making this role both challenging and incredibly rewarding.
[...]
As a Senior Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will play a pivotal role in leading our analytics initiatives across omni-channel retail environments. Your responsibilities will extend beyond traditional data analysis to include strategic leadership, team mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration.
[...]
- Provide visionary leadership and set strategic direction for the data science team, with a focus on omni-channel analysis covering both brick-and-mortar retail and e-commerce platforms

- Lead cross-functional teams, collaborating with Analysts, Technical Partners, and Business Leaders to establish a comprehensive roadmap based on business needs and market opportunities

- Mentor and develop junior data scientists and analysts, fostering a culture of continuous learning and excellence
[...]
- Set and enforce data science team best practices while conducting code reviews to ensure high-quality, maintainable solutions
[...]
- Translate complex business requirements into precise technical specifications that guide development and implementation

- Lead architecture design sessions, aligning strategies with business drivers, challenges, and long-term organizational objectives

- Design and implement efficient data pipelines to address critical business challenges, utilizing advanced technical tools and retail systems

- Apply advanced analytical techniques including regression analysis, machine learning, clustering, and time series forecasting to extract meaningful insights

- Conduct root cause analysis and troubleshooting to identify underlying issues and recommend data-driven solutions
[...]
2+ years of experience developing Analysis, Statistical, or AI models to extract insights and address business challenges, preferably in a retail or e-commerce setting
[...]
in modern data environments
[...]
### Machine Learning:
[...]
Proficiency in machine learning or AI techniques with practical application experience
[...]
- Experience with various project management methodologies (Waterfall, Agile, Scrum)

- Familiarity with retail-specific analytics and consumer behavior modeling

- Experience in the entertainment, media, or consumer goods industries

- Advanced degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or related field
[...]
### Statistical & Data Science Languages:
[...]
R, SAS, Python for Data Science
[...]
### Machine Learning Techniques:
[...]
Regression analysis, clustering, statistical inference, hypothesis testing, p-values, causal inference, Random Forest, Bagging, Boosting, Time Series analysis
[...]

results.title: Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization at McCormick & Company - United States Remote
highlights:
Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization at McCormick & Company - United States Remote
[...]
# Global Data Scientist – Marketing Measurement and Optimization
[...]
### 📋 Description
[...]
• Lead the design and implementation of next-gen media measurement and optimization capabilities, integrating marketing mix, long term brand equity measurement, in-flight measurement (e.g., lift studies, A/B testing), pre-market factors that affect media (e.g., creative testing) • Develop media-driven volume forecasting tools to integrate into McCormick’s demand forecasting platform • Drive and leverage external connections to find new and improved tools and approaches to bring into McCormick • Partner with vendors used for outsourced models, serving as lead consultant on technical methodology alignment integration with new capabilities • Develop training content that enables business partners to use marketing optimization capabilities more effectively
[...]
### 🎯 Requirements
[...]
• Bachelor’s degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering or Data Analytics/Science, or closely related field • 4+ years’ experience in data science, with media analytics exposure a plus • Demonstrated sound understanding of concepts, principles and practices in Marketing and Sales • Demonstrated skills and results in analyzing complex datasets, generating insights and building robust statistical models • Demonstrated ability to connect the dots between complex data/analytics and business understanding • Proficiency with building dashboards for business users using data visualization software (Power BI preferred) • Expertise in SQL and Python coding • Demonstrated experience with building data models, machine learning & AI • Comfortable working with structured and unstructured data sources, e.g. syndicated data • Proven project leadership experience with demonstrated success in balancing multiple projects in a fast-paced environment; foresees and addresses issues before they become significant obstacles • Strong technical curiosity, a passion for problem solving and the ability to uncover richness of analytic insight that translates to business opportunity • Demonstrated agile learning skills; ability to learn new technology, skills & tools quickly and easily • Ability to synthesize analytic learnings and translate into compelling stories for a business audience • Effective at building collaborative, cross functional and cross-geography partnerships • Excellent written communication and presentation skills • Ability to travel internationally, as needed (0-5%) • Strong personal leadership, including attention to detail, quality of work and bias toward action • CPG or Food/Bev experience (preferred) • Understanding of the business and technical aspects of Marketing Mix Modeling, Media Effectiveness Testing tools (Lift, A/B, etc.), Creative Testing, and proficiency for the evolution of and other tools in the Media Effectiveness Space (preferred)
[...]

Position Summary...Invent the Future of Operations: Design AI systems that reimagine how inventory is managed, products are produced, and associates work.Advance GenAI & Agentic AI: Scale AI agents capable of reasoning, orchestrating tasks, and dynamically adjusting to real-world signals.Drive Enterprise-Scale Impact: Deliver AI solutions that create value across the chain, improving efficiency, reducing waste, and unlocking growth.Build Reusable Innovation: Develop frameworks that can be leveraged enterprise-wide, fueling AI innovation beyond the club environment.Lead with Responsibility: Ensure solutions are safe, explainable, and aligned with ethical AI practices.Inspire & Mentor: Shape the next generation of data scientists through technical leadership, and thought partnership.

At Sam's Club Applied AI Labs, we're shaping the next phase of in-club operations: where associates are guided by intelligent agents, decisions are informed by live signals, and every member interaction is enhanced through AI innovation.The In-Club AI team is the engine behind this transformation. We're building the future of retail operations with next-generation machine learning, GenAI, and agentic AI systems that don't just predict outcomes-they adapt, reason, and act in real time. Our mission is ambitious: to redefine how clubs run, scale solutions across the enterprise, and create reusable AI that powers innovation far beyond the sales floor.

The annual salary range for this position is $110,000.00 - $220,000.00

results.title: SENIOR DIRECTOR OF TECHNOLOGY- MDM & DATA PLATFORMS (REMOTE) | Zenvok
highlights: intelligence engine of Compass Group North America. We design and deliver custom, in-house solutions tailored to the unique complexities of food service and hospitality. Our work is grounded in strong data foundations, layered with AI to enhance forecasting, streamline operations, and enable better, faster decision-making across Compass Group. With deep integration into the business and a commitment to white-glove service, CDAI empowers associates, clients, and customers through innovative, future-forward technologies. About the Role We are seeking a Sr. Director of Technology to lead the technical direction and delivery of our Master Data Management (MDM) platform. This role focuses on defining architectural vision and guardrails, establishing engineering discipline and leading the adoption of AI-enabled development practices.  You will partner closely with Product Leadership and embedded technology leaders to ensure strong alignment between business priorities and technical execution.    We are looking for a leader who can operate at both strategic and operational levels—someone who can define the future, elevate people, and drive meaningful change across teams. Key Responsibilities Platform & Architecture Define and own the architecture vision for MDM, PIM, and integration services Establish architectural guardrails, patterns, and standards across all product teams Drive decisions on data models, integration patterns, and platform design Ensure alignment with enterprise architecture, security, and scalability requirements Engineering Standards & Delivery Define & enforce SDLC standards for testing, code quality, and releases Partner with DevOps on CI/CD, reliability, and environment practices Implement consistent release governance and production readiness practices AI Enablement & Engineering Transformation Lead the adoption of AI-assisted development practices across the engineering organization Define standards and guardrails for results.title: Applied Data Scientist | Hirequorum
highlights:
Applied Data Scientist | Hirequorum
[...]
# Applied Data Scientist
[...]
Are you passionate about using data science, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics to propel decisions? If you are interested in driving meaningful change for a growth focused consumer products brand, this is an opportunity to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights!
[...]
Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives.
[...]
As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI.
[...]
- Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights.
- Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency.
- Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams.
- Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs.
- Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations.
- Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite.
[...]
- 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems.
- 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation.
- 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets.
- 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations.
- 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar).
- 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment.
[...]
- Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field.
[...]
- 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred.
- 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings.
- 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods.

# Darden Restaurants Lead Engineer Salaries in Palm Bay, FL

The average Darden Restaurants Lead Engineer in Palm Bay, FL earns an estimated $139,042 annually, which includes an estimated base salary of $126,517 with a $12,525 bonus. Darden Restaurants' Lead Engineer compensation is $3,501 more than the US average for a Lead Engineer. Lead Engineer salaries at Darden Restaurants in Palm Bay, FL can range from $134,000 - $139,700.

In Palm Bay, FL, The Engineering Department at Darden Restaurants earns $8,760 more on average than the Marketing Department.

results.title: Sr. Data Scientist, Gen AI Automation | Hirevector
highlights:
Sr. Data Scientist, Gen AI Automation | Hirevector
[...]
# Sr. Data Scientist, Gen AI Automation
[...]
At Pinterest, AI isn't just a feature, it's a powerful partner that augments our creativity and amplifies our impact, and we’re looking for candidates who are excited to be a part of that. To get a complete picture of your experience and abilities, we’ll explore your foundational skills and how you collaborate with AI.
[...]
Are you passionate about applying GenAI to improve efficiency and accelerate business execution—grounded in strong data foundations? Join Pinterest’s IT Enterprise Systems team to build analytics engineering and GenAI capabilities that power our go-to-market and corporate operations. You’ll create trusted data models and pipelines across core enterprise platforms and layer in LLM-enabled workflows with clear evaluation, observability, and guardrails.
[...]
- Build production-grade GenAI-enabled analytics solutions that integrate enterprise data sources (e.g., Salesforce, Gong, Oracle, IBM Planning Analytics, and other SaaS platforms).
[...]
- Establish end-to-end LLM pipelines (retrieval/orchestration) with evaluation frameworks, observability, and validation guardrails to ensure reliability and safety.
[...]
- Lead technical scoping for GenAI use cases, assessing feasibility, accuracy expectations, risk, and ROI—then translating into clear technical plans.
[...]
- Design and own analytics-ready data models, including dimensional modeling (star schemas, fact/dimension tables, SCD Type 2) that support reporting, forecasting, and downstream applications.
[...]
- Develop and maintain robust data pipelines and orchestration (Airflow and/or dbt or similar), including data quality checks, SLAs, monitoring, and failure recovery.
[...]
- Write and optimize complex SQL for transformation and analysis across enterprise datasets (joins, window functions, CTEs, performance tuning).
[...]
- Partner closely with business stakeholders, turning ambiguous questions into well-scoped requirements, success metrics, and deliverables; communicate tradeoffs and constraints clearly.
[...]
- Use AI tools to accelerate development responsibly (e.g., drafting SQL/Python, iterating on prompts, summarizing findings), while applying rigorous testing and verification.
[...]
- Define best practices for GenAI in analytics engineering, including prompt patterns for analytics tasks, model selection, and cost/latency optimization.
[...]
- What we're looking for:
[...]
- 8+ years in analytics engineering, data engineering, data science, or related roles (or equivalent experience).
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Data Science, Mathematics, or a related field (or equivalent experience).
[...]
- Strong understanding of LLM fundamentals and practical tradeoffs, including:
[...]
- Capabilities, limitations and common failure modes.
[...]
- Tokenization, context windows, latency/cost considerations.
[...]
- RAG vs. fine-tuning vs. prompting/tools for use cases.
[...]
- Expert SQL skills (complex joins, window functions, CTEs, query optimization).
[...]
- Hands-on experience with dimensional modeling (star schemas, SCD Type 2) and workflow orchestration tools such as Airflow, dbt.
[...]
- Demonstrated ability to validate AI-assisted output.
[...]
- High integrity and ownership to handle sensitive enterprise data appropriately and remain accountable for final outputs.
[...]
- Strong stakeholder communication with the ability to explain technical constraints to non-technical partners.
[...]
- Experience with GenAI coding tools (e.g., Cursor, Claude Code) to accelerate development while maintaining code quality and maintainability.
[...]
- US based applicants only
- $139,764—$287,749 USD

results.title: **Experienced Full Stack Data Analyst – AI Model Development and Deployment** | Hirevector
highlights:
**Experienced Full Stack Data Analyst – AI Model Development and Deployment** | Hirevector
[...]
# **Experienced Full Stack Data Analyst – AI Model Development and Deployment**
[...]
At arenaflex, we're a dynamic and innovative company that's always pushing the boundaries of what's possible. Our mission is to create and deliver exceptional experiences for our visitors, and we're constantly seeking new ways to improve these experiences. As a Key Information Researcher in our team, you'll play a crucial role in directing the creation, implementation, and support of data analysis and AI (ML) model development for our attractions. You'll work closely with internal partners to deliver elite visitor experiences with intelligent and data-driven systems across arenaflex's Disney Encounters (DX).
[...]
We're seeking an experienced Full Stack Data Analyst to join our team and contribute to the development and deployment of AI models for our attractions. As a Full Stack Data Analyst, you'll work closely with our data science team to design, implement, and maintain data-driven systems that deliver exceptional visitor experiences. You'll be responsible for leading and collaborating with cross-functional teams to execute and scale ML solutions, driving innovation and growth through data-driven insights.
[...]
- Collaborate with data scientists and engineers to design, implement, and maintain data-driven systems that deliver exceptional visitor experiences
[...]
- Lead and work with cross-functional teams to execute and scale ML solutions, driving innovation and growth through data-driven insights
[...]
- Drive innovation, idea generation, and proof-of-concept development to grow top-tier AI stages
[...]
- Manage functional support and maintenance of ML-related products and services delivered by the team
[...]
- Productionize ML models in predictive analysis, clustering, image recognition, NLP, anomaly detection, and more, and assess their performance on real-world datasets
[...]
- 2+ years of experience in Python and predictive modeling, including TensorFlow, SparkMLib, PySpark, Light, MXNet, and more
- 2+ years of experience in cloud platforms like AWS and GCP
- Proficiency in SDLC, QA cycles, and Agile development methodologies
- Master-level experience in structured and unstructured data (i.e., images, video, text, etc.) and SQL social and non-social datasets
[...]
- 2+ years of experience with Windstream or another data workflow management tool
[...]
- Experience with version control software, like GitHub and GitLab, Model Operations, and CI/CD pipelines
- Experience in driving discovery processes with partners to identify business requirements and desired outcomes, and determination to complete responsibilities
[...]
- Strong systems
[...]
- Experience with Docker
- Experience with control frameworks
- Experience with Kubernetes
- Experience with cloud platforms in GCP or another cloud stage
- Experience with Atlassian tools like Jira and Confluence
- Experience with Agile development methodologies
- Experience with automated testing, continuous integration, and continuous deployment
- Experience with data representation and data validation tools (e.g., Splunk, Plotly, Tableau)
- Experience with audio analysis
- Experience with text analysis
[...]
- Competitive salary and benefits package
- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI and ML projects
- Collaborative and dynamic work environment
- Professional development and growth opportunities
- Flexible remote work arrangement
- Access to the latest technologies and tools
- Recognition and rewards for outstanding performance
[...]
If you're passionate about AI, ML, and data-driven innovation, and you're looking for a challenging and rewarding role, we encourage you to apply. Please submit your resume and a cover letter explaining why you're the ideal candidate for this role. We can't wait to hear from you!
